title: AntiModplugin
description: "This plugin is designed as an Anti-Mod system to prevent unauthorized or non-approved mods from being used on the server.
body:
This plugin is designed for Spigot servers to ensure that players have the required Anti Mod client-side mod installed before joining. It helps server administrators enforce the use of this specific mod and prevents players without it from connecting.

🔹 How it works:
– When a player joins, the plugin checks for the Anti Mod mod.
– If the mod is not detected, the player will be kicked 5 seconds after joining.
– All join attempts are logged for review by server administrators.

⚠️ Requirements:
– Players must have the Anti Mod mod installed on their client to join the server.

✅ Compatibility:
– Tested on Spigot [1.21].
– May work on other versions, but only confirmed for the version above.

Note: This plugin only checks for the Anti Mod client-side mod. It does not detect all unauthorized modifications or hacked clients.
